name: Pimiento Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the chicken breasts lengthwise.
2. In a skillet, cook the chicken in hot oil for about 6 minutes or until no pink remains, turning once. Remove and keep warm.
3. Cook onion and garlic in oil until tender. Stir in uncooked rice and mushrooms.
4. Add broth, wine, saffron, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper to the skillet. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes or until rice is tender.
6. Stir in thawed peas and drained pimientos. Heat through.
7. Serve by placing rice on a plate and covering with chicken breasts. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
